title: Pipeline: Splicing in Monocytes using ONT
author: Bodelón, Alejandra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This release includes the code used to perform the bioinformatics analysis from the manuscript: 
 Bodelón, A., van Haaren, M.J.H., Sobrevals Alcaraz, P.  et al.   Native long-read RNA sequencing of human monocytes reveals activation-induced alternative splicing toward functional isoforms .  Nat Commun  (2026). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-026-73661-5 
 This version has been archived via Zenodo to obtain a citable DOI for reproducibility.
steps_raw:
